title: Music Sync
body:
# Music Sync
**Synchronizing background music for all players online on your multiplayer server! Enjoy the beats together!**

# ✅ Features
- **Synchronize music** with all players online
- **Server & client-side**
- **Resourcepack support** for those who add custom minecaft music
- **Dragon fight & Credits priority** so that you don't miss out on the epicness!

# ⚙️ How it works
1. Request what music type players should be listening to (depends on biome, dimension & more)
2. Choose a random music type out of all players (dragon fight & credits have priority)
3. Send (and play) the music type to all players
4. Wait for all players to be done listening to the music & the delay between music to be over
5. Repeat!
